name: Fill the Cat Box!
short_description: A casual 3D physics puzzle game, similar to Suika Game, Watermelon Game, where you combine cats of the same size and color to create larger cats. Fit as many cats into the box as you can before letting a cat fall out! Try to break your old high scores! Watermelon in background.
detailed_description: A Casual 3D Physics Puzzle game similar to Suika Game, Watermelon Game, where you combine cats of the same size and color to create larger cats. Fit as many cats into the box as you can before letting a cat fall out and touch the table! Try to break your old high scores! Move the cats in 2 dimensions above the box to find the best drop location, rotate around the box to see it from multiple angles.
about_the_game: A Casual 3D Physics Puzzle game similar to Suika Game, Watermelon Game, where you combine cats of the same size and color to create larger cats. Fit as many cats into the box as you can before letting a cat fall out and touch the table! Try to break your old high scores! Move the cats in 2 dimensions above the box to find the best drop location, rotate around the box to see it from multiple angles.
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
